eligible_case_count.description: Eligible production support cases in the requested opened window; unit: cases.

open_at_cutoff_count.description: Cases active at the cutoff, including the reopened subset; unit: cases.

reopened_at_cutoff_count.description: Reopened subset of cases active at the cutoff; unit: cases.

first_response_breach_count.description: Eligible cases beyond the priority first-response active-time threshold; unit: cases.

active_clock_resolution_breach_count.description: Eligible cases beyond the priority resolution active-time threshold; unit: cases.

worst_accounts.description: Exactly three eligible accounts ordered by severe active case count descending, active-clock breach count descending, then account ID ascending.

active_clock_breach_count.description: Resolution active-clock breaches among the account's eligible cases.

severe_active_case_ids.description: Exact severe active case IDs sorted ascending.

median_active_resolution_hours.description: Median active resolution time across eligible cases resolved at the cutoff, rounded to 2 decimal places; unit: hours.
